question: Looking at the US population map, which statement below is the most accurate?

options.A: The population gap between Texas and California might exceed that between Texas and North Carolina.
options.B: Texas and California have very similar populations.
options.C: North Carolina and Delaware have more diverse population levels than Texas and California.
options.D: The population differences are impossible to determine from this visualization.

explanation: Tennessee (16.0M) and Wisconsin (20.8M) have a 4.8M population difference, while Oregon (24.9M) and West Virginia (27.3M) have only a 2.4M difference. However, the categorical color encoding groups Tennessee and Wisconsin into the same color bin (15-25M range), making their large difference appear similar, while Oregon and West Virginia appear more different due to different color bins.
